subcategories.title: Open Source Analysis and Weak Web Signals

hero.headline: Redefining Strategic Intelligence in West Africa
hero.extractionText: Expertise at the core of extractive industries. From the Simandou 2040 project to mineral sovereignty issues, we transform raw field data into strategic insights on the assets and resources driving the regional economy.
hero.asintText: Intelligence on structures and fundamental shifts. Macroeconomic analysis, institutional monitoring, and geopolitics: we decrypt market complexity to secure your decision-making and anticipate future mutations.

spotlight.title: Innovation at the Service of Intelligence
spotlight.description: We don’t just report the facts. We leverage Artificial Intelligence to process millions of data points, identify weak signals, and anticipate market shifts before they occur.

asint.title: Strategic Monitoring
asint.description: Real-time monitoring of geopolitical risks and institutional movements. Don't just react to the news, anticipate it.

extraction.title: Sectoral Reports
extraction.description: In-depth dossiers on extractive industries: mining, bauxite, and oil. Local field expertise serving your investment strategy.

data.title: Predictive Analysis
data.description: Through our proprietary AI models, access reliable macroeconomic projections to secure your strategic market positions.

theGroup.title: The Threshold Ecosystem
theGroup.description: A pivotal point between information and decision. Threshold Media Group brings together hybrid expertise: investigative journalism, macro analysis, and artificial intelligence to illuminate West African markets and serve those who invest, operate, and lead within them.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: Delivering strategic clarity where information is fragmented. We transform on-the-ground complexity into decision-making tools for the leaders shaping West Africa’s future.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To become the essential analytical benchmark for the region's economic dynamics. We believe in uncompromising information: factual, calibrated, and directly actionable.
vision.subtitle: By combining a physical presence in Conakry and Dakar with cutting-edge technology, we provide a depth of insight that no generalist media can match.

stats.reach: Key West African markets under permanent monitoring

editorialTeam.title: The Analytical Threshold
editorialTeam.description: The point of passage between field noise and strategic signal. Our experts fuse human investigation with artificial intelligence to transform complexity into actionable clarity.

identity.title: A Senior Strategic Advisor Persona
identity.description: We don't just popularize; we reveal. Our tone is analytical, confident, and committed. We don't write from an ivory tower; we are on the ground, connecting the dots that others miss.

pillarsOfIntelligence.title: The 3 Pillars of our Intelligence
pillarsOfIntelligence.p1: Deep Local Anchor (We are in Conakry and Dakar, not London).
pillarsOfIntelligence.p2: Strategic Rigor (Articles designed to be quoted in board meetings).

ourMediaBrands.title: Our Media Brands
ourMediaBrands.description: Each of our media brands is designed to meet specific strategic needs. From in-depth sectoral reports to real-time institutional monitoring, we provide a range of products that together form a comprehensive intelligence ecosystem.

technology.title: Strategic AI
technology.headline: Data-Augmented Intelligence
technology.subtext: Transforming informational chaos into strategic clarity.
technology.rightHeadline: Technology at the service of decision-making precision.
technology.rightSubHeadline: A proprietary model designed to decode West African markets.
technology.paragraph1: Our AI ecosystem processes millions of data points daily from financial flows to subtle signals across the web to isolate critical trends before they become public knowledge. We don't just automate information; we extract strategic value.
technology.paragraph2: More than a simple search engine, our intelligent assistant allows TMG Pro and Guinea Intelligence subscribers to instantly query our exclusive database on tenders, mining permits, and regional regulatory frameworks. It is your senior expert, available 24/7.

features.f3Desc: Query our proprietary database of West African strategic data for instant, actionable insights.

editorialProcess.title: Our Editorial Process
editorialProcess.description: From field investigation to your inbox, our process is designed for strategic impact. We combine on-the-ground reporting with rigorous analysis and AI-driven data processing to deliver insights that are not only accurate but directly actionable for decision-makers.
editorialProcess.subDescription: Each article undergoes a multi-step process: field investigation, data analysis, editorial synthesis, and strategic calibration. The result? Content that is not just informative but designed to be quoted in boardrooms and used in strategic discussions.

pricing.headline: Choose the pricing plan
pricing.subtext: Whether you're an individual investor or a business, we have a subscription plan tailored to your needs. Our pricing is designed to provide maximum value and strategic insight at every level of access.

plans.title: Freemium
plans.description: Weekly editorial digest, public articles, and selected premium excerpts.

plans.title: TMG Pro Individual
plans.description: Premium access to TMG's intelligence verticals and personalized weekly briefings

plans.title: TMG Pro Business
plans.description: Team access and tailored intelligence for organizations operating across West Africa.

contact.title: Stop Operating in the Blind Spot
contact.subtitle: Whether you need a bespoke intelligence report or an enterprise subscription, our experts are ready to assist your decision-making process.

footer.description: To become the essential analytical benchmark for the region's economic dynamics.

sections.title: 1. Who we are
sections.content:
Threshold Media Group (TMG) is a digital media platform focused on business intelligence, economic analysis and strategic information covering Guinea and West Africa. TMG is operated by Palabre Holding.

Data controller: Palabre Holding
Contact: privacy@thresholdmediagroup.com
Website: thresholdmediagroup.com

sections.title: 2. What data we collect and why
sections.content:
2.1 Account and newsletter registration
When you subscribe to our newsletter or create a TMG Pro account, we collect your email address and full name. We use this information to send you editorial content, manage your subscription and communicate with you about your account. The legal basis for this processing is your consent, which you can withdraw at any time.

2.2 Payment information (TMG Pro)
When you subscribe to TMG Pro, payment is processed through LengoPay. TMG does not store your card details directly. LengoPay processes and stores payment data on our behalf under their own security and compliance standards. We retain transaction records for accounting and legal purposes.

2.3 Analytics and cookies
We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors use our website. This involves the collection of data such as pages visited, time spent on the site, browser type, device type and approximate geographic location. This data is anonymised and aggregated. We use cookies to enable this analytics functionality. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through our cookie banner or browser settings.

2.4 Data we do not collect
We do not collect sensitive personal data such as racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, health data or biometric data.

sections.title: 3. How we use your data
sections.content:
We use the data we collect for the following purposes:
- To send you our newsletters and editorial content
- To manage your TMG Pro subscription and process payments
- To analyse website performance and improve our content
- To respond to your inquiries
- To comply with our legal obligations

We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We do not use your data for automated decision-making or profiling.

sections.title: 4. Who we share your data with
sections.content:
We share data only with the following categories of third parties, strictly necessary for the operation of our services:
- LengoPay: payment processing for TMG Pro subscriptions
- Mailchimp: newsletter distribution and subscriber management
- Google Analytics: website analytics
- Hosting and infrastructure providers: for the operation of our website

All third parties are required to handle your data in accordance with applicable privacy laws.

sections.title: 5. How long we keep your data
sections.content:
Newsletter subscribers: we retain your email address and name for as long as your subscription is active. You may unsubscribe at any time.

TMG Pro accounts: we retain account data for the duration of your subscription and for a period of 3 years thereafter for accounting and legal purposes.

Analytics data: Google Analytics data is retained for 14 months by default.

sections.title: 6. Your rights
sections.content:
Depending on your country of residence, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
- Right of access: you can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
- Right to rectification: you can ask us to correct inaccurate data
- Right to erasure: you can ask us to delete your data, subject to our legal obligations
- Right to withdraw consent: you can unsubscribe from our newsletter or withdraw analytics consent at any time
- Right to data portability: you can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format
- Right to object: you can object to certain types of processing

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@thresholdmediagroup.com. We will respond within 30 days.

sections.title: 7. Cookies
sections.content:
We use the following types of cookies on our website:
- Essential cookies: necessary for the site to function. Cannot be disabled.
- Analytics cookies: Google Analytics, used to understand how you use our site. You can opt out via our cookie banner or by installing the Google Analytics opt-out browser add-on.

We do not use advertising or targeting cookies.

sections.title: 8. International data transfers
sections.content: TMG is operated from Guinea and serves an international audience. Some of our third-party providers, including Google and Mailchimp, are based in the United States. Where your data is transferred outside your country of residence, we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place in accordance with applicable law.

sections.title: 9. Security
sections.content: We take reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, loss or disclosure. All payment transactions are processed through encrypted channels via LengoPay.

sections.title: 10. Changes to this policy
sections.content: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or by posting a notice on our website. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of this page.

sections.title: 11. Contact
sections.content: For any questions about this privacy policy or your personal data, contact us at: privacy@thresholdmediagroup.com

termsAndConditions.headline: TERMS AND CONDITIONS — THRESHOLD MEDIA GROUP

sections.title: 1. Who we are
sections.content:
These Terms and Conditions govern your use of the Threshold Media Group website and services, including TMG Pro. By accessing our website or using our services, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

TMG is operated by Palabre Holding. Contact: legal@thresholdmediagroup.com

sections.title: 2. Our content
sections.content:
2.1 Editorial content
All articles, analyses, briefings, newsletters and other editorial content published on TMG are produced for informational and strategic intelligence purposes only. Nothing published on TMG constitutes financial, legal, investment or professional advice.

2.2 AI-assisted production
Some TMG content is produced with the assistance of artificial intelligence tools and editorial AI systems. All content is reviewed and validated by human editors before publication. TMG takes editorial responsibility for all published content.

2.3 Intellectual property
All content published on TMG, including articles, graphics, logos and design elements, is the property of Palabre Holding or its licensors. You may not reproduce, republish, distribute or commercialise any TMG content without prior written permission.

You may share links to our content and quote brief excerpts for non-commercial purposes, provided you clearly attribute the source as Threshold Media Group with a link to the original article.

sections.title: 3. TMG Pro subscription
sections.content:
3.1 What TMG Pro includes
TMG Pro gives subscribers access to premium content, newsletters, archives and analysis not available to free users. The exact content included in TMG Pro may evolve over time. We will notify subscribers of material changes.

3.2 Pricing
Monthly subscription: $14 USD per month
Annual subscription: $140 EUR per year
Prices may be updated with 30 days' notice to existing subscribers.

3.3 Payment
Payment is processed through LengoPay. By subscribing, you authorise recurring charges at the frequency you select. All payments are non-refundable except as required by applicable law.

3.4 Cancellation
You may cancel your TMG Pro subscription at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period. You will retain access until that date.

sections.title: 4. User conduct
sections.content:
You agree not to use the TMG website or services to:
- Copy, scrape or systematically download our content for commercial purposes
- Use automated tools to access or extract data from our website without authorisation
- Impersonate TMG, Palabre Holding or any of our staff
- Post or transmit any unlawful, defamatory or harmful content through any interactive feature of our platform
- Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of our systems

sections.title: 5. Disclaimer of warranties
sections.content: TMG content is provided on an "as is" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of our content. Market conditions, political situations and economic data change rapidly. TMG cannot guarantee that all published information reflects the most current situation at the time of reading.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Palabre Holding shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental or consequential damages arising from your use of the TMG website or reliance on its content. This includes but is not limited to investment decisions, business decisions or any other decisions made on the basis of TMG content.

sections.title: 7. Third-party links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. TMG is not responsible for the content, privacy practices or availability of those websites. Links do not constitute endorsement.

sections.title: 8. Governing law
sections.content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of the Republic of Guinea. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Conakry.

sections.title: 9. Changes to these terms
sections.content: We may update these Terms and Conditions from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by email or by posting a notice on our website. Continued use of our services after changes take effect constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content: For any questions about these Terms and Conditions: legal@thresholdmediagroup.com

sections.question: What is Threshold Media Group?
sections.answer: Threshold Media Group is a strategic digital media platform covering business, investment, mining, infrastructure, finance and economic transformation in Guinea and West Africa. We publish in English and French across three verticals: Extraction, ASINT and Innovation.

sections.question: Who produces TMG content?
sections.answer: Our editorial team selects and validates all content. Some articles are produced with the assistance of AI editorial tools and then reviewed and approved by human editors before publication. TMG takes full editorial responsibility for everything we publish.

sections.question: Is TMG content financial or investment advice?
sections.answer: No. TMG content is produced for informational and strategic intelligence purposes. Nothing we publish constitutes financial, legal or investment advice. You should consult a qualified professional before making any investment or business decision.

sections.question: What is TMG Pro?
sections.answer: TMG Pro is our premium subscription offering. It gives you access to exclusive content, newsletters, archives and deeper analysis not available to free users. TMG Pro is available at $14 USD per month or $140 EUR per year.

sections.question: How do I subscribe to TMG Pro?
sections.answer: You can subscribe to TMG Pro directly on our website. Payment is processed securely through LengoPay. You can cancel at any time from your account settings.

sections.question: Can I cancel my TMG Pro subscription?
sections.answer: Yes. You can cancel at any time. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period. We do not offer refunds for partial periods.

sections.question: How do I subscribe to the free newsletter?
sections.answer: You can subscribe to our free newsletter by entering your email address in the subscription form on our homepage or at the bottom of any article. You can unsubscribe at any time using the link in any newsletter email.

sections.question: How does TMG use my personal data?
sections.answer: We use your data only to send you content you have requested, to manage your subscription and to improve our website through analytics. We do not sell your data. For full details, see our Privacy Policy.

sections.question: Can I use or republish TMG content?
sections.answer: You may share links to our articles and quote brief excerpts for non-commercial purposes with clear attribution to Threshold Media Group and a link to the original article. For any other use, including commercial reproduction, please contact us at editorial@thresholdmediagroup.com.

sections.question: I found an error in an article. How do I report it?
sections.answer: We take editorial accuracy seriously. If you find an error, please contact us at editorial@thresholdmediagroup.com with the article URL and the specific correction you are proposing. We review all correction requests and update articles when warranted.

sections.question: How do I contact TMG?
sections.answer:
For editorial inquiries: editorial@thresholdmediagroup.com
For partnerships and sponsoring: partnerships@thresholdmediagroup.com
For privacy and data requests: privacy@thresholdmediagroup.com
For legal matters: legal@thresholdmediagroup.com
